name: P90 | 浅坟
descriptionEn: Easily recognizable for its unique bullpup design, the P90 is a great weapon to shoot on the move due to its high-capacity magazine and low recoil. The grips have been painted to resemble rune stones, and a hydrographic of a skeleton has been applied to the stock. With the amount of bodies you're racking up, who has time to dig?
descriptionZh: 因其独特的无托设计而更加容易辨认，多亏了 P90 高容量的弹匣和低后坐力，这把武器非常适合边移动边射击。 涂装了握把，从而使其看上去像符石，层压板上也附上了骷髅花纹。 都伏尸百万了，谁还有时间去挖坟？
